acceptance_criteria: Upload avatar via Ivory appears on profile; avatar URL returns the correct media file; header upload works similarly; uploading new avatar replaces old one; old media file can be cleaned up; avatar dimensions are reasonable (400x400 thumbnail)
description: Add avatar and header image upload to PATCH /api/v1/accounts/update_credentials. These are multipart file uploads alongside the other profile fields. Store as media rows in the media table with null post_id. Update accounts.avatar_media_id and header_media_id. Process asynchronously (resize/blurhash). Return updated account with avatar and header URLs.
design: Same image processing pipeline as regular media. Avatar: process to 400x400 max. Header: process to 1500x500 max (Mastodon default). Account.avatar = full URL to media file. Account.avatar_static = same (no animated avatars in v1). Update accounts row with new media_id.
title: Avatar and header image upload
